title: koeleria novozelandica
intro: Koeleria novozelandica, also known as New Zealand hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The medicinal properties of Koeleria novozelandica also contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Koeleria novozelandica is often prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
